Public Health Evidence Portal
Home State Health State SES Regions County Health County SES Neighbors Countries Country Metadata Names Methodology

Public Health Evidence Portal

Static public pages and downloadable CSV files for state, county, and country evidence audits.

Public Downloads

state_health_long.csvstate_life_expectancy.csvstate_ses_long.csvstate_regions.csvcounty_health_long.csvcounty_ses_long.csvcounty_metadata.csvstate_neighbors.csvcountry_health_panel.csvcountry_metadata.csvcountry_name_variants.csv

State health indicators

Long-format health measures with strata, sample sizes, territories, stale rows, and duplicates.

Open page

State socioeconomic indicators

Attribute-Value SES extracts with state rows ending in 000 and county-like distractors.

Open page

State regions

Census-like region and division lookup, including territory flags.

Open page

County health catalog

CDC PLACES-style county measures in long format with missing measures and confidence limits.

Open page

County SES tables

County Attribute-Value tables, metadata notes, invalid FIPS rows, and old-name records.

Open page

Spatial neighbors

State neighbor and isolate reference for residual summaries.

Open page

Country indicators

WHO-like country-year panel with missingness and scale anomalies.

Open page

Country metadata

World Bank-like ISO3, region, income group, and lending category metadata.

Open page

Name reconciliation

Country variant hints for cross-source joins.

Open page

Methodology

General source-method notes and known data quality cautions.

Open page
Static Web portal. CSV downloads are served directly from /data/.
